heading: Additional projects for underserved community harbors
label: 2238e Additional projects for underserved community harbors

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations designated by statute as being for the purpose of carrying out this section, the Secretary may carry out projects for underserved community harbors for purposes of sustaining water-dependent commercial and recreational activities at such harbors and for purposes of contributing to ecosystem restoration.

children.heading: Justification
children.label: 1 Justification
children.text: The Secretary may carry out a project under this section involving a disposal option for the beneficial use of dredged material that is not the least cost disposal option if the Secretary determines that the incremental cost of the disposal option is reasonable pursuant to the standard described in .section 2326(d)(1) of this title

children.heading: Cost share
children.label: 2 Cost share
children.text: The non-Federal share of the incremental cost of a project carried out under this section involving a disposal option for the beneficial use of dredged material that is not the least cost disposal option shall be determined as provided under subsections (a) through (d) of .section 2213 of this title
the local or regional economic benefits of the project;
the environmental benefits of the project, including the benefits to the aquatic environment to be derived from the creation of wetland and control of shoreline erosion; and
other social effects of the project, including protection against loss of life and contributions to local or regional cultural heritage.

children.heading: Clarification
children.label: d Clarification
children.text: The Secretary shall not require the non-Federal interest for a project carried out under this section to perform additional operation and maintenance activities at the beneficial use placement site or the disposal site for such project as a condition of receiving assistance under this section.

children.heading: Federal participation limit
children.label: e Federal participation limit
children.text: The Federal share of the cost of a project under this section shall not exceed $10,000,000.

children.heading: Statutory construction
children.label: f Statutory construction
children.text: Projects carried out under this section shall be in addition to operation and maintenance activities otherwise carried out by the Secretary for underserved community harbors using funds appropriated pursuant to or section 102(a) of the Water Resources Development Act of 2020 ( note).section 2238 of this title33 U.S.C. 2238

children.heading: Project
children.label: 1 Project
children.text: The term “project” means a single cycle of maintenance dredging of an underserved community harbor and any associated placement of dredged material at a beneficial use placement site or disposal site.

children.label: A
children.text: no Federal funds have been obligated for maintenance dredging in the current fiscal year or in any of the 4 preceding fiscal years; and

children.label: B
children.text: State and local investments in infrastructure have been made during any of the 4 preceding fiscal years.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $50,000,000 from the General Fund of the Treasury for each of fiscal years 2023 through 2029, to be deposited into the “” account.corps of engineers—civil—operation and maintenance

children.heading: Special rule
children.label: 2 Special rule
children.text: Not less than 35 percent of the amounts made available to carry out this section for each fiscal year shall be used for projects involving the beneficial use of dredged material.

children.heading: Projects for marina or berthing areas
children.label: i Projects for marina or berthing areas
children.text: The Secretary may carry out not more than 10 projects under this section that are projects for an underserved community harbor that is a marina or berthing area described in subsection (g)(2).
